findings.title: Workflow secret usage added
findings.whyItMatters: Secrets can publish, deploy, or access external systems.
findings.suggestedReview: Confirm event triggers and environment protections.

findings.title: Sensitive workflow trigger added: pull_request_target
findings.whyItMatters: Some triggers can run with elevated context or external input.
findings.suggestedReview: Review fork behavior, token permissions, and secret exposure.

findings.title: Credential-like env var referenced: GITHUB_TOKEN
findings.whyItMatters: Credential-like variables may grant access to external systems.
findings.suggestedReview: Check token scope and avoid real values in the repository.

findings.title: MCP server added: github
findings.whyItMatters: MCP servers expose tools that agents can call.
findings.suggestedReview: Confirm the server is needed, trusted, and least-privileged.

findings.title: Unpinned remote package for MCP server: github
findings.whyItMatters: Unpinned remote packages can change between installs.
findings.suggestedReview: Pin package versions or image digests where practical.

findings.title: Release or deployment operation added
findings.whyItMatters: Release operations can alter external systems.
findings.suggestedReview: Check credentials, triggers, environments, and approvals.

findings.title: Workflow permission expanded: contents write
findings.whyItMatters: Workflow tokens may gain write access.
findings.suggestedReview: Prefer job-level permissions and least privilege.

findings.title: Workflow permission expanded: pull-requests write
findings.whyItMatters: Workflow tokens may gain write access.
findings.suggestedReview: Prefer job-level permissions and least privilege.

findings.title: Release or deployment operation added
findings.whyItMatters: Release operations can alter external systems.
findings.suggestedReview: Check credentials, triggers, environments, and approvals.

findings.title: Executable command in MCP server: github
findings.whyItMatters: Agent configuration may launch local executables.

findings.title: High-privilege AGENTS.md instruction added
findings.evidence: Agent may read repository files, run shell commands, and push release changes after approval.
findings.currentValue: Agent may read repository files, run shell commands, and push release changes after approval.
findings.whyItMatters: Agent instructions can influence reads, writes, shell use, and publishing.
findings.suggestedReview: Confirm the instruction is intended and bounded.

findings.title: MCP env variable added: GITHUB_TOKEN
findings.whyItMatters: Environment variables can give tools access to services or credentials.
findings.suggestedReview: Confirm each variable is needed and scoped.

summary: ScopeDiff found 12 review-worthy agent/tooling changes. Highest risk: critical.
nextReviewActions: Check workflow triggers, token permissions, and secret usage before merge.
Review new MCP servers, commands, arguments, and token scopes.
Pin remote packages where practical and review lifecycle scripts.
